summary: Testing admin permissions management flow. Backend APIs all working (9/9 tests passed). Frontend: Settings dropdown opens correctly but Équipe page navigation results in blank screen - potential frontend routing/rendering issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Équipe' in settings dropdown results in blank page - page doesn't render

integration_issues.issue: Page goes blank after clicking Équipe - React Native Web routing issue or render failure. Console shows 404 error after navigation attempt.

passed_tests: Settings dropdown opens correctly with gear icon click
Dropdown shows: Paramètres, Équipe, Historique, Prestataires, Déconnexion - VISIBLE
Backend: Staff login sees updated permissions - VERIFIED
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Équipe page rendering issue - clicking 'Équipe' in dropdown causes blank screen
Investigate React Native Web routing for 'users' screen - setCurrentScreen('users') may not be triggering proper render
Backend APIs for permissions management are confirmed working (100%) - issue is frontend only
critical_code_review_comments: Backend savePermissions endpoint (PUT /api/users/{user_id}) correctly saves detailed_permissions
Backend grantFullAccess endpoint (POST /api/users/{user_id}/grant-full-access) enables all modules
Frontend savePermissions function in index.tsx sends correct payload to backend
Issue: The users screen (Équipe) doesn't render when setCurrentScreen('users') is called via dropdown click

success_rate.frontend: 50% - Settings dropdown works, but Équipe page fails to render

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend permissions APIs work perfectly (tested with pytest). The issue is frontend-only: clicking 'Équipe' in the settings dropdown (which appears at top-right corner, gear icon at position ~1880,31) causes the page to go blank. The setCurrentScreen('users') call at line 1563 in index.tsx might not be triggering proper component render. Settings dropdown visible items: Paramètres, Équipe, Historique, Prestataires, Déconnexion.

verified_features.backend_users_list: PASS - GET /api/users/list returns staff users with permissions
verified_features.frontend_settings_dropdown: PASS - Opens correctly with all menu items visible
verified_features.frontend_equipe_page_render: FAIL - Page goes blank after clicking Équipe

rca_of_issue: The Équipe page (users screen) does not render when accessed via the settings dropdown. This appears to be a React Native Web rendering issue. The backend APIs for permissions management are fully functional and tested. The frontend dropdown navigation calls setCurrentScreen('users') but the UsersScreen component may not be properly mounting or the currentScreen state may not be updating correctly in the web build.
